_note: FROZEN, SCRUBBED 2-day slice of a real `ccusage openclaw daily --json` envelope. Keys/shape/modelName/date preserved; token/cost NUMBERS replaced with synthetic round values. Exercises the OpenClaw divergence: NO per-model token split — each day yields ONE canonical record, model = the single `modelsUsed` entry with the `[openclaw] ` prefix stripped (day 1), or `(all)` when the day spans multiple models (day 2). Decoded field-by-field by the ccusage-decoder-contract gate via the app's decodeOpenclawDaily.
